description: kenneth cole New york is manufactured using the highest quality materials and craftsmanship.  The incorporation of both traditional and contemporary design philosophy result in a unique and modern product.  Choose this watch to display your sophisticated and discerning taste in accessories.Case diameter: 22 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: RectangleWarranty: Two yearsGold coloured steel rectengle caseWhite leather strap with a tang claspWhite dial with gold coloured handsBranding at the 12 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
